hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env'; then echo 'Blocked: direct edits to .env files are not allowed — edit them manually' && exit 2; fi
